channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Flatbush Zombies’ Erick the Architect misses his BlackBerry keyboard
item.description: Erick the Architect is a founding member of, and the primary producer for, the legendary Flatbush Zombies. He's toured the world, performed on Kimmel and Fallon, played Coachella, and collaborated with everyone from Joey Bada$$ and the Rza to James Blake and hardcore punk band Trash Talk. But perhaps the most unexpected collab was with […]

item.title: What's happened to Nikon and Fujifilm in 2026? Why they haven't launched any cameras yet — and what I expect to see later this year
item.description: Nikon and Fujifilm have been awfully quiet in 2026 — here's what I expect to happen next.

item.title: TCL PlayCube review: I used this portable projector for business presentations and watching movies, and it’s brilliantly simple
item.description: A compact 1080p projector with Google TV, battery power, and a clever rotating body, enabling big-screen viewing in a backpack-friendly cube.

item.title: Trunk Tools' stack cut document review from 60 days to 10 by ditching general-purpose models
item.description: Most verticals aren’t clean, well-oiled SaaS databases; the reality is ugly documents, proprietary schemas, implicit workflows, and long‑running tasks that most general-purpose models struggle with. This prompted construction project management company Trunk Tools to build a specialized, three-layer architecture — perception, semantics, agents — based on highly-detailed data to support high-accuracy, highly-relevant industry automation.Their purpose-built stack has shrunk review cycles from months to days, prevented costly field errors, and given autonomous agents the ability to reason over mi...

item.title: Paraguay – France : à quelle heure et sur quelle chaîne regarder le 8e de finale ?
item.description: La France entre dans le tableau final de la Coupe du monde 2026 : les Bleus affrontent le Paraguay en 8e de finale dans la nuit du samedi 4 juillet. M6 diffuse le match gratuitement, beIN Sports 1 le propose également, voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir pour ne pas rater ce match décisif.

item.title: How to watch Canada vs Morocco: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Canada vs Morocco for free online and from anywhere as the co-hosts chase more history against the Atlas Lions in the World Cup last 16.

item.title: Hey number pad lovers, this is a keyboard we can finally agree on
item.description: I know a vocal group of people who swear by the number pad on their keyboard. And yet, for years I haven't cared about using one - until I put my hands on the Epomaker RT98. It's a mechanical keyboard with a charming retro aesthetic, a fun CRT-like screen, VIA compatibility, a nice typing feel, […]

item.title: J’ai testé l’Amazfit Bip Max, la meilleure montre XXL à moins de 100 euros ?
item.description: L’Amazfit Bip Max est une smartwatch XXL abordable qui promet une autonomie exceptionnelle tout en offrant un suivi précis de vos entraînements. Nous l’avons testée pendant deux semaines afin d’évaluer ses performances.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for July 4, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: Router brands could be misleading you with that Wi-Fi 7 label
item.description: Wi-Fi standards remain as confusing as ever.

item.title: En promo à moins de 800 € : faut-il craquer pour la référence Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 ou l’outsider Motorola Razr 70 ?
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 et le Motorola Razr 70 profitent d'une belle baisse de prix pendant les soldes. L'occasion idéale de s'offrir un smartphone au format clapet sans se ruiner. Mais entre ces deux rivaux, lequel faut-il choisir ?
